name: compliquest
description: Intelligent compliance management and automation platform

scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.test:run: npm run test:run -w backend && npm run test:run -w frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w backend && npm run test:coverage -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w backend && npm run lint:fix -w frontend
scripts.format: npm run format -w backend && npm run format -w frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules infrastructure/node_modules && npm install

author: CompliQuest Team
